creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

Committed with minor improvements (more usage of USES), except for ROMS: 
1. The distribution rights are indeed uncertain. 
2. The current patch for it looks hackish in my view.  It would be cleaner 
to create a new tarball for those ROMs than to rely on an old version of 
the port itself (but see 1, what about the distributing site of this 
new tarball ?) 
3. These extra ROMs can be easily downloaded and copied into DATADIR 
manually.
